notes:
- The bridge can SEE. New vision ops let the AI photograph the level and photo-booth materials/meshes far away from your map - from its own self-cleaning camera rig that never touches your viewport.
- New safety, on by default: "AI must visually verify its work". The runner photographs whatever a job places or builds and refuses further work until the AI reviews the shots - half-buried or broken-looking results get caught by the AI instead of you.
- Raw screenshot/camera code is gated; captures only happen through the safe built-in ops.
- New read ops: list_actors, validate, runfile.
- The in-editor runner now always starts OFF unless turned on, and its event log no longer grows forever.
- Open Folders opens only what's relevant (and the screenshots folder once captures exist).

After the app updates, each project shows "Update Bridge Payload" once - that click installs the new runner (payload 1.4-bridge). Restart UEFN afterwards.
